programme.title: Kya Haal, Mr. Paanchal?
programme.desc: Kunti Devi ends up with 5 bahus with 5 Different qualities and together they become quite a lot for the mother and son to handle - hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Dadi suffers a panic attack after Mintu goes missing. Elsewhere, Nimki is worried about the consequences of changing her decision about Ganga Devi.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Tunne consoles a dejected Nimki while Parag holds Mishra at gunpoint. After Dadi wreaks havoc, Nimki makes an unexpected offer to calm her down.

programme.title: Mann Ki Awaaz Pratigya
programme.desc: Pratigya is righteous public prosecutor who finds herself conflicted between her duty and responsibility on one side and her emotions as a mother on the other side.. Whose side would she chose?

programme.title: Gupta Brothers
programme.desc: Shiv gets busy fixing Alok and Jaya's marriage. While Ganga shocks him by disclosing Alok and Aditi's relationship, Shiv takes an unexpected decision.

programme.title: Lakshmi Ghar Aayi
programme.desc: Raghav and Maithili take shelter in a shop due to riots. After a desperate search, Arun finds Maithili and Raghav together in a questionable position. Jwala clicks a photo of the same.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Sweety teases Nimki about Mintu while Ganga Devi slaps Parag for his rude remark. Later, Mahua is overwhelmed by Nimki's words in front of the media.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Parag is furious to learn the truth about Mahua's identity while Nimki creates a scene during a photo session. Later, Parag tries to run over Mahua with his car.

programme.title: Mann Ki Awaaz Pratigya
programme.desc: Pratigya is righteous public prosecutor who finds herself conflicted between her duty and responsibility on one side and her emotions as a mother on the other side.. Whose side would she chose?

programme.desc: Mr. Bansal demands Alok to make a false confession to Aditi but Shiv refuses his proposal. Later, Mr. Bansal makes up a false story to Aditi.

programme.desc: Sujay and Deepika take a child left at the orphanage to raise as their own. However, years later, Sujay gets a call asking him for INR 5 lakhs to cover the fact they adopted a baby illegally.

programme.desc: Ganga Devi orders Shankar to kill Mintu. Elsewhere, Nimki rushes to meet Mintu after waking up from a horrific nightmare.

programme.title: Kya Haal, Mr. Paanchal?
programme.desc: Kunti Devi ends up with 5 bahus with 5 Different qualities and together they become quite a lot for the mother and son to handle - hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Kya Haal, Mr. Paanchal?
programme.desc: Kunti Devi ends up with 5 bahus with 5 Different qualities and together they become quite a lot for the mother and son to handle - hilarity ensues.

programme.title: Kya Haal, Mr. Paanchal?
programme.desc: Kunti appreciates Pratibha after learning the reason behind her act. Later, Kunti, Pratibha and Prema fret due to Pari's deed!

programme.title: Gupta Brothers
programme.desc: While Aditi reaches Alok's home with a gun in hand, Ganga reveals the truth to her. Before Jaya gets ready for her wedding, Ganga gives her surprising news.

programme.title: Gupta Brothers
programme.desc: While Aditi emotionally blackmails Alok to come to see her, Jaya makes an unthinkable sacrifice. Later, Shiv gets a threatening call from Mr. Bansal.

programme.title: Gupta Brothers
programme.desc: Aditi gives Alok a warning. While Amba creates a huge scene, Alok and Aditi arrive at the house, much to everyone's shock.

programme.title: Gupta Brothers
programme.desc: Jaya pours her heart out to Alok while Amba has a shocking outburst. Later, Mr. Bansal pulls a gun at Shiv, leaving him rattled.

programme.desc: The story focuses on how a girl child is never a liability and how she becomes an inspirational champion of the anti-dowry movement.

programme.desc: Pratigya is righteous public prosecutor who finds herself conflicted between her duty and responsibility on one side and her emotions as a mother on the other side.. Whose side would she chose?

programme.desc: Talented and renowned chefs share some of the most delicious and unique food recipes to the viewers from their respective homes.

programme.title: Shanghai (2012)
programme.desc: A group of people embark on a journey to unravel the mystery behind a social activist's death. With the government asserting it as an accident, they struggle hard to unveil the truth.

programme.desc: A soulful retelling of Radha and Krishna's story that stood the test of time to become the epitome of eternal love, friendship, romance and sacrifice.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Nimki is repentant after Mahua reveals Mintu's truth while Ganga Devi gives Parag an ominous warning. Later, Mintu's Dadi slaps Nimki in a fury.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Ganga Devi orders Shankar to kill Mintu. Elsewhere, Nimki rushes to meet Mintu after waking up from a horrific nightmare.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Dadi shoots sharp accusations at Nimki as Mintu's health deteriorates, and later hinders Nimki's plan to meet Mintu.

programme.title: Nimki Vidhayak
programme.desc: Nimki plans to mislead Dadi and enter Mintu's ward while Sweety is overwhelmed with emotion. Later, Nimki gives an apologetic speech to Mintu.

programme.title: Savdhaan India - Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: Shammi, a maid, steals from the houses she works and absconds with Pappu, her boyfriend. However, things get complicated when she ends up killing Pappu and Shikha, her new boss.
